name: Sixth Street Specialty Lending, Inc.
business: Sixth Street Specialty Lending, Inc. is a business development company that originates investments in U.S. middle-market companies. It generates revenues primarily in the form of interest income from senior secured loans and, to a lesser extent, mezzanine and unsecured loans and equity securities.

exposures.sentence: Cybersecurity risks and cyber incidents may adversely affect our business or those of our portfolio companies.

catalysts.event: SEC exemptive order granted for co-investment with affiliates
catalysts.sentence: On May 6, 2025, we, the Adviser and certain of our affiliates were granted an exemptive order from the SEC that allows us to co-invest, subject to certain conditions, with certain of our affiliates (including affiliates of Sixth Street) in middle-market loan origination activities for companies domiciled in the United States.

catalysts.event: Formation of joint venture Structured Credit Partners JV, LLC with Carlyle
catalysts.sentence: On December 23, 2025, affiliates of Sixth Street, including us, and affiliates of Carlyle Group Inc. entered into an amended and restated limited liability company agreement, as amended from time to time (the Limited Liability Company Agreement ), to co-manage Structured Credit Partners JV, LLC ( SCP ), a joint venture focused on investing in broadly syndicated first lien senior secured loans, financed with long-term, non-mark-to-market, and predominantly investment grade rated CLO debt managed by affiliates of Sixth Street or Carlyle on a no-fee basis.

catalysts.event: Board renewed Investment Advisory Agreement and Administration Agreement
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, our Board renewed the Investment Advisory Agreement and the Administration Agreement.
